formulas.name: Root Mean Square (RMS) Value of Alternating Voltage
formulas.variables: Vrms = RMS voltage, V0 = Peak voltage

formulas.name: Root Mean Square (RMS) Value of Alternating Current
formulas.variables: Irms = RMS current, I0 = Peak current

formulas.name: Average Power in Alternating Current
formulas.variables: Pavg = Average power, Vrms = RMS voltage, Irms = RMS current, cosφ = Power factor

formulas.name: True Power Factor
formulas.variables: cosφ = Power factor, P = Real power, Vrms = RMS voltage, Irms = RMS current

formulas.name: Apparent Power
formulas.variables: S = Apparent power, Vrms = RMS voltage, Irms = RMS current

formulas.name: Power Factor in Terms of Resistance, Inductive Reactance, and Capacitive Reactance
formulas.variables: cosφ = Power factor, R = Resistance, XL = Inductive reactance, XC = Capacitive reactance

formulas.name: Impedance
formulas.variables: Z = Impedance, R = Resistance, XL = Inductive reactance, XC = Capacitive reactance

formulas.name: Reactance of a Capacitor
formulas.variables: XC = Capacitive reactance, ω = Angular frequency, C = Capacitance

formulas.name: Reactance of an Inductor
formulas.variables: XL = Inductive reactance, ω = Angular frequency, L = Inductance
